title: 12 Mths (UP TO $4300) HR Executive  #TNKA
description:
Company: Performance Motors Limited @ Alexandra Road

Executive, People/ HR Experience ( 1 Year Contract)

Working hours : 8.30am – 6.00pm

Salary range : max $4300, $60 Hp allowance. 1 month completion bonus

Employee Lifecycle Management & Advisory

  • Facilitate onboarding and offboarding processes, ensuring a seamless experience for employees.
  • Maintain accurate employee records and update personal details in HR systems.
  • Serve as a first point of contact for HR-related queries across platforms (e.g., AskHR), providing timely and accurate guidance.
  • Advise line managers and employees on HR policies, procedures, and employment matters.
  • Notify relevant departments (HR Shared Services, IT, local IT) to deactivate system access for resignees.
  • For Sales Department resignees, inform F&I and motor insurance partners (e.g., SD Contego, AXA) to remove nominee representation.

Work Pass & Compliance

  • Perform OFWAS updates for employees’ residential addresses and manage work pass renewals.
  • Monitor and maintain a healthy work pass quota.
  • Track and ensure foreign technicians and CSAs obtain valid Singapore driving licences.
  • Stay informed on employment laws and ensure compliance with statutory reporting (e.g., MOM OED, other MOM reports).

Employee Relations & Engagement

  • Support disciplinary and grievance handling processes, promoting fair and consistent practices.
  • Conduct exit interviews, analyze feedback, and share insights with management to improve employee experience and retention.
  • Coordinate employee engagement initiatives, including focus groups, dialogue sessions, and follow-up on action plans.
  • Source government funding to support engagement activities and manage related budgets.
  • Proactively check in with employees to understand their concerns and provide appropriate support or escalation where needed.

Performance & Talent Management

  • Monitor employee confirmation dates and coordinate with line managers on employment decisions (confirmation, probation extension, non-confirmation).
  • Support performance management cycles, including annual appraisals, increment, and bonus exercises.
  • Assist in identifying talent development needs and support career planning initiatives.

Reporting & Administration

  • Prepare monthly PX manpower reports and other required submissions.
  • Verify and process invoices and purchase orders.

Projects & Continuous Improvement

  • Participate in PX projects and initiatives aimed at enhancing employee experience and operational efficiency.
  • Contribute ideas and feedback to improve PX processes, systems, and policies.

Requirements:

  • At least 2 years of relevant working experience in a HR generalist role
  • Knowledge in Employment Act, HR applications and statutory requirements
  • Good knowledge in advanced MS Excel and IT savvy

Frederick Tan

The Outsourcing Team

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA Lic: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
